name: The Sun
description: The Sun is the star at the center of our solar system.

name: The Beehive Cluster
description: The Beehive Cluster is a group of stars.

name: The Needle Galaxy
shortDescription: A thin edge-on spiral galaxy viewed from the side.
description: NGC 4565 is an edge-on spiral galaxy often called the Needle Galaxy. We see it from the side, which makes it appear as a long thin line across space.
